executive_summary: On March 26, 2026, OFAC removed three entities from the sanctions list. The removed entities, Belaruskali OAO, AGROROZKVIT LLC, and OPEN JOINT STOCK COMPANY BELARUSIAN POTASH COMPANY, were previously sanctioned under the BELARUS-EO14038 program. The removal of these entities may indicate a shift in US policy towards Belarus. The removals may also impact compliance efforts for companies doing business in the region.

notable_entities.name: Belaruskali OAO
notable_entities.significance: Removal from sanctions list may impact potash trade and US-Belarus relations

notable_entities.name: AGROROZKVIT LLC
notable_entities.significance: Removal from sanctions list may affect agricultural trade and Ukraine-Belarus relations

notable_entities.name: OPEN JOINT STOCK COMPANY BELARUSIAN POTASH COMPANY
notable_entities.significance: Removal from sanctions list may impact global potash market and Belarusian economy

risk_implications.description: Companies doing business in Belarus or with Belarusian entities must review and update their compliance programs to reflect the removal of these entities from the sanctions list
The removal of these entities from the sanctions list may lead to increased trade between the US and Belarus, but the impact is expected to be limited

program_highlights.note: Three entities were removed from the program, indicating a potential shift in US policy towards Belarus

compliance_recommendations: Review and update compliance programs to reflect changes to the sanctions list
Monitor US policy towards Belarus and potential future sanctions changes
Conduct due diligence on Belarusian entities and individuals to ensure compliance with remaining sanctions
